title: Add VoiceEnable Agent to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [VoiceEnable Agent](https://metamysteries8.github.io/realtimed/) to chat
- Enable voice functionality for VoiceEnable Agent.

Fixes #12081

gist.headline: The hive finds its voice
gist.blurb: The VoiceEnable Agent has sprouted in the community greenhouse, bringing voice-enabled chat to the ecosystem.
gist.summary: Added the VoiceEnable Agent to the community apps directory and greenhouse, enabling voice functionality for chat interactions.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with the VoiceEnable Agent directly from the community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny headset with a microphone, talking to a retro computer in a greenhouse setting with pixelated sound waves.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny headset with a microphone, happily chatting with a chunky retro computer monitor in a lush digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Small pixelated sound waves float in the air. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, retro gaming vibes.
